## What happened?

Describe the issue clearly.

## Where did you find it?

Link to the relevant file or section.

## What did you expect?

Describe what would be clearer, more accurate, or more consistent.

## Suggested fix

If you have a suggested change, include it here.

## Additional context

Add any other relevant context.
